description: tx-sync-worker sync_logs 7d 对账面板 — W4 cutover (5/25-6/1) Phase 1 dry_run 一周观察期可视化. 数据源 PostgreSQL sync_logs 表; status='success' (gateway 真路径) vs status='dry_run' (sync-worker Phase 1) 双边对账, delta_pct ≤ 10% 为通过. 配套 SQL runbook: docs/governance/runbooks/tx-sync-worker-reconciliation.sql; 父 issue #806 / hotfix PR #819. RLS 策略: Grafana 数据源使用持 BYPASSRLS 的 ops role 跨租户汇总展示 (与 wecom_sop.py:79-82 跨租户初始 SELECT 同语义, FU-7 prod role verify 前置); per-merchant 钻取需 ops 在 SQL runbook 跑 `SET LOCAL app.tenant_id = '<uuid>';` 切租户.

links.title: SQL Runbook (5 queries)
links.tooltip: 完整 SQL 主对账 / 趋势 / records 差异 / wecom 例外 / 告警阈值 5 query

panels.title: 7d 全局对账总览 (success vs dry_run vs delta_pct)

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'success') AS "success 行数",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'dry_run') AS "dry_run 行数",
  ROUND(
    (ABS(
      COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'success')::numeric
      - COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'dry_run')::numeric
    ) / NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'dry_run'), 0)) * 100,
    2
  ) AS "全局 delta_pct (%)",
  COUNT(DISTINCT merchant_code) AS "涉及 merchant 数"
FROM sync_logs
WHERE started_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days';

panels.title: per (merchant, sync_type) 7d 对账明细 (success / dry_run / delta_pct)
panels.description: 对账主轨 (Query 1). delta_pct > 10% 红色高亮; NULL 行 = dry_run_count=0 (真路径正常时灰色). ORDER BY delta_pct DESC NULLS LAST 突出异常.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  DATE(started_at AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Shanghai') AS day,
  merchant_code,
  sync_type,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'success') AS success_count,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'dry_run') AS dry_run_count,
  ROUND(
    (ABS(
      COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'success')::numeric
      - COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'dry_run')::numeric
    ) / NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'dry_run'), 0)) * 100,
    2
  ) AS "delta_pct (%)"
FROM sync_logs
WHERE started_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
GROUP BY 1, 2, 3
ORDER BY 1 DESC, "delta_pct (%)" DESC NULLS LAST;

panels.title: delta_pct 7d 趋势 (per merchant 着色)
panels.description: 日级 delta_pct 走势; >10% 阈线红色; 持续 ≥ 2 天高位 → cutover gate 阻塞 (Query 5 同等阈值).

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  DATE(started_at AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Shanghai')::timestamptz AS time,
  merchant_code AS metric,
  ROUND(
    AVG(
      ABS(
        (CASE WHEN status = 'success' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::numeric
        - (CASE WHEN status = 'dry_run' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::numeric
      )
    ) * 100,
    2
  ) AS value
FROM sync_logs
WHERE started_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
GROUP BY 1, 2
ORDER BY 1 ASC;

panels.title: records_synced 真路径 vs dry_run 比较 (per merchant)
panels.description: Query 3 配套. 真路径 avg/max records (有量级); dry_run rows 期望全 0 (反向 sanity). 任何 dry_run_rows > 0 → P0-2 实现回归.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  merchant_code || ' / ' || sync_type AS "组合",
  ROUND(AVG(records_synced) FILTER (WHERE status = 'success'), 1) AS success_avg_records,
  COALESCE(SUM(records_synced) FILTER (WHERE status = 'dry_run'), 0) AS dry_run_rows
FROM sync_logs
WHERE started_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
GROUP BY merchant_code, sync_type
ORDER BY success_avg_records DESC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 30;

panels.title: 告警: delta_pct > 10% 持续 ≥ 2 天的异常组合 (Query 5)
panels.description: cutover gate 阻塞表 — 0 行 = 通过 W4 cutover; ≥ 1 行 = 立 follow-up issue 调查后 Phase 2 PR-A 延后 ship. 任何行红底高亮.

targets.rawSql:
WITH daily_delta AS (
  SELECT
    DATE(started_at AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Shanghai') AS day,
    merchant_code,
    sync_type,
    (ABS(
      COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'success')::numeric
      - COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'dry_run')::numeric
    ) / NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'dry_run'), 0)) * 100 AS delta_pct
  FROM sync_logs
  WHERE started_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
  GROUP BY 1, 2, 3
)
SELECT
  merchant_code,
  sync_type,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE delta_pct > 10.0) AS anomaly_days,
  ROUND(MAX(delta_pct)::numeric, 2) AS max_delta_pct
FROM daily_delta
WHERE delta_pct IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY merchant_code, sync_type
HAVING COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE delta_pct > 10.0) >= 2
ORDER BY anomaly_days DESC, max_delta_pct DESC;

panels.title: wecom_sop 例外行 sanity (期望全 0, Query 4)
panels.description: wecom_sop 单 job 不入 sync_logs (per #806 DOD FU-8). 此 panel 期望永远 0; 任何非 0 = wecom 误调 _write_sync_log 回归 bug. wecom 真对账走 Prometheus tx_sync_worker_executions_total{job="wecom_group_daily_sop"}.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  COALESCE(COUNT(*), 0) AS "wecom 误写行数 (期望 0)"
FROM sync_logs
WHERE started_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
  AND (sync_type LIKE 'wecom%' OR sync_type LIKE '%sop%');

title: tx-sync-worker sync_logs 7d 对账
